#弅喃木剉﹛﹛??﹛巟鼹
#
#﹛﹛﹛凌607984及摒

###﹛凌607984午凌607974毛赭当

block Item_607984 >= 1 && Item_607974 >= 1

	KillItem 607984,1,(3004861)
	KillItem 607974,1,(3004862)
	GiveItem(607680%15,607685%10,608600%10,608603%10,607993%15,607716%15,631056%5,631057%10,631058%10),(3004863)



###﹛宁丹坁互卅中

block

	SystemMessage 3004868
